# `vendor/`

Vendored third-party source, Google-style monorepo. Patches, reverts, and
history live in this repo's `git log` — no nested `.git`.

## Contents

| Path | What it is |
|---|---|
| `rivet/` | Vendored Rivet engine + RivetKit SDKs at the [pax-rivet-refactor](../../pax-rivet-refactor/) pin. See [`rivet/UPSTREAM.md`](rivet/UPSTREAM.md) for the pin + bump procedure. |
